{"module_number": 2, "title": "Root Agent Governance", "corpus_tags": ["ARCHITECT"], "content": "type User @table {
  name: String!
  email: String!
  createdAt: Timestamp!
  provider: String
  sovereignScore: Int
  lastLoginAt: Timestamp
}

type IdentityVector @table {
  name: String!
  icon: String!
  description: String
}

type UserVectorStatus @table {
  user: User!
  identityVector: IdentityVector!
  sovereigntyScore: Int!
  nukedCount: Int!
  knoxedCount: Int!
  monitoredCount: Int!
  lastScanAt: Timestamp!
  statusNotes: String
}

type Finding @table {
  userVectorStatus: UserVectorStatus!
  type: String!
  label: String!
  detail: String!
  createdAt: Timestamp!
  action: String
  status: String
}

type MonitoredEmail @table {
  user: User!
  emailAddress: String!
  status: String!
  createdAt: Timestamp!
  lastCheckedAt: Timestamp
}
"}
